description: How a prior work relates to an idea's trajectory.

values.name: Origin
values.use_when: the prior work is where the idea first clearly appears.

values.name: Elaboration
values.use_when: the prior work deepens or extends the idea.

values.name: Peak Deployment
values.use_when: the prior work is the strongest or fullest expression of the idea.

values.name: Demotion
values.use_when: the prior work reduces or sidelines the idea.

values.name: Absence
values.use_when: the prior work is notable because the idea is missing.

values.name: Retirement
values.use_when: the prior work marks the effective end of the idea's active life.
